entry.title: Data Analytics Internship
entry.content:
Internship Title(s): Data Analytics Internship

Internship Opportunity Highlights (Location, top skills required, type of employment…): 

We are seeking a person passionate in the world of data and analytics to join our dynamic team and play a key role in using SAP technology to address business challenges

Job Description:

You will be responsible for implementing data solutions using SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud. Your work will help us streamline capturing data from upstream source systems, developing robust data models, and deliver insightful analytics. You will collaborate with our Data lead and work with cross-functional teams to ensure data architecture aligns with business goals and drives strategic decision-making.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design and implement ETL processes to extract, transform, and load data from various sources into SAP Datasphere.
  • Develop and maintain data models that support business intelligence and analytics requirements.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to understand data needs and translate them into technical specifications.
  • Optimize data architecture for scalability, performance, and security.
  • Perform data analysis to identify trends and insights that support business strategies.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve data-related issues to ensure data integrity and quality.
  • Stay updated with the latest SAP Datasphere features and industry best practices.
  • Build SAP Analytics Cloud Reports as per provided specifications

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree/Major in Computer Science, Information Systems is an asset
  • Bachelor's degree/Major in Finances or Management is required.
  • Trained in data modeling and ETL processes.
  • Good understanding of data architecture principles and analytics tools.
  • Proficiency in SQL and experience with programming languages such as Python required
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills.

Knowledge of SAP S/4, SAP Business Warehouse, SAP Data Services, SAP Business Objects, BPC/BW on HANA, SAP ECC Finance & Controlling (ECC FI/CO) a plus

Candidates certified as SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud from the Digital Skills Initiative Analytics Bootcamp will be given priority. 

Who are we :

We are a small, strategic consulting company based in Chicagoland (Highland Park., IL) and Montreal. We are interested in hearing from candidates who possess a majority of the experience listed and like to build, not maintain. See below video for more information.

 

About Us video

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JPN-8CFPIZA

https://simplefisolutions.com/who-we-are/

Application Review Date: Mid-August 2024

Apply through: contact@simplefisolutions.com

Related SAP Learning Journeys and/or SAP Certifications: Data Analyst SAP Analytics Cloud, Introduction to SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
Hi there @nsathya_infy 

Indeed you can. There's just a regular old Debian powered x86_64 architecture Linux box (I am fond of saying "the Cloud is just a load of Linux machines" :-)). But one thing you need to know is that HTTP/S access to the outside world is via a proxy, managed by the BAS infrastructure. And while ngrok can work with proxies like this, it's an enterprise-grade feature that is not free. And I have to also say that running ngrok in a Dev Space is probably not allowed, at least not for commercial purposes.

Here's a suggestion, though - if you needed a remote/virtual work space to do these tasks, then you could try GitHub Codespaces. Like BAS Dev Spaces, they're also based on VS Code (Code OSS to be more precise) and you'll have almost exactly the same IDE experience, including a terminal. 

Here's a screenshot of everything you'd need to do - downloading, installing, configuring and starting ngrok, for a locally (in the Codespace) running CAP service. If you clone the northbreeze GitHub repo then you can start a codespace via the green Code button (select the down-arrow for options) and go from there. Good luck!

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud - How to extend Material Master...
entry.content:
Hi Manuel,

This is not possible today.

However, there is a plan (Subject to change - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/288512) to introduce this in future SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition releases (+2025).

The idea will be to provide this added functionality to extend the material master number to up to 40 characters similar to what was provided in S/4HANA on-premise.  The extension will also come with some of the same restrictions included in on-premise.

Hope this helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Initially created an unbound function and was receiving the value correctly. 

But then realized after getting an error via the deployed application that instead of function, an unbound action is expected. 

So changed it to action, but then started getting this error. 

Can anyone please help if they have encountered this or have knowledge on this?

entry.title: Re: Statistical Key Figures Data Posting in KB31N
entry.content: Can we execute KB31N through background Job ? Is there any standard Program for this please.

entry.title: Re: Deleted line item not display in Print preview
entry.content: Hi, I have developed purchase order output form in the adobe livecycle, I was uploaded form in the maintain purchase order after that i run the purchase order with some deleted line items, and non deleted items, but in the output purchase order shows deleted lineitems also, so here i don't want show deleted lineitems in the purchase order output form, any one can say how to do that not required lineitems, please any one comment me how to approach that

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterpris...
entry.content:
c_baker said in a comment in this discussion:

EDCA / Replication Server Heterogeneous Edition are no longer avaialble. See https://me.sap.com/notes/3408368 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2702069

So I guess that answers that.

Ben

entry.title: Re: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content:
I think it is absolutely right, that there is still much room for improvement!

Some small changes can have a positive impact on the usability ... for example, what I requested quite a while ago: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321496 

In a SAP on Prem. system this is not relevant... but it a Cloud product with higher latency it would be quite helpful.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a business rule for recurrin...
entry.content:
When you say "recurring payments" are you referring to recurring Pay Components? If so, we have created such a rule based on the Trigger Workflows scenario and the Compensation Information Model, as shown below:

However, the Trigger Workflows rule scenario does not allow raising a message--only Set statements.

entry.title: How to mass upload Commercial Projects in SAP S4 Public cloud through API?
entry.content: How to upload mass data into SAP S4 Public could for Commercial Projects object through API, and what connection needs to be developed in BODS?

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Rather than me tell you directly, I'll give you a hint.

Functions are called with GET and parameters are sent inside parentheses at the end of the URL. 

Actions, on the other hand, are called with POST and parameters are sent in the payload of the request, usually in JSON.

It most likely didn't help that I confused you into creating a function first, sorry. So - just check how you're making the call to your action. It is likely / possible that you've implemented it correctly - it's just that you're calling it like a function 🙂 

HTH!

entry.title: Re: Signavio SAP Process Manager license clearing
entry.content: Is there any overview what is not activated by default and customer needs to ask for it ?

entry.title: Re: Batch session is not created in SM35 for few FCR runs
entry.content: Hello All, Can you please help me on the above query?

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Both different persons 😊

entry.title: Re: Finding the G/L Account Not Used field
entry.content:
Hi @lamtq

In part, it depends on where you would want to use the model. The “G/L Account Not Used” flag is indeed used in the Implementation Status feature, and it determines whether an account is transported into your production system, so for any model that you’d run in that system, those accounts are already “ignored” as such (not there), so such a flag isn’t necessary. 

For models in your test environment, you can access the needed field via the I_GLAccountInCompanyCode or  I_GLAccountInChartOfAccounts CDS views, depending on the level at which the model should run. 

I hope this answers your question.

Thanks,

Anthony

entry.title: Learning Offline Player
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The customer wishes to enable offline learning. For that, as you know, we need to install the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) in order to execute the Offline Player Installer. 

I’ve asked the IT department there and they confirmed that they don’t install the JRE on their workstations since it is no longer free. They are now asking if the SAP SuccessFactors Learning Offline Player is compatible with OpenJDK. Could anyone please confirm this? If not, could you share with us your suggestions on what to do.

Thank you in advance.

 

 

 

Regards,

Asma CHARIF

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thanks! the new place looks great. Happy to connect, learn and Share.

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content: Actually, I would say changing the Tutorials is a better idea. I have submitted Issues in GitHub pointing that out. Reading the background in the Kubernetes Git Hub of why namespaceSelector uses labels and why they chose to have api server create the kubernetes.io/metadata.name label. It is actually more secure than relying on a user input label. By using kubernetes.io/metadata.name we are guaranteed that is the actual Namespace name, not someone adding a name label impersonating the namespace we actually want.

entry.title: Setting up billing document attachment email settings by Cost Center
entry.content:
SAP S4Hana public cloud standard sends invoices to the project manager after a billing document is completed. I understand this is configured in the output determination settings application.

Billing Document:

Output items:

Email example:

Output determination settings:

We are now looking for the invoice to be sent via email to a particular individual/ group of individuals where the invoice is created out of a specific cost center in SAP S4hana public cloud.

Is there any configuration (manage your solution) or settings (output parameter determination) that we could make use off within SAP. We did check through these options but we could not see where we could set this up for a specific cost center

Please provide possible solutions to achieve the above

#COE,#DE01

entry.title: Identifying Re-packed Handling Units in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is there a way to determine if a particular HU has been re-packed? Currently, I am using the table /SCWM/ORDIM_C and checking if the VLENR (Source HU) and NLENR (Destination HU) are different to conclude that it was re-packed. Please let me know if there is a better method to identify this.

Thanks in advance for your help.

Madhu M V

entry.title: Re: Error while doing a manual Create with Flexible Programming Model
entry.content: I have the same problem, have you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.14
entry.content:
Hi @meganhoy 

 

Nope, that one says same page now found. maybe its a me issue but i can open other help pages and SAP support with my s-user with no issue including SAC roadmap.

entry.title: Re: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the below script:Chart_1 is the source and Table_1 is target

var list=Chart_1.getSelections();
var list1=[""];
for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++)
{
list1[i]=list[i]["Product_3e315003an"];
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Product_3e315003an",list1[i]);    
}

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

Yes, we would change the tutorial.

However, for me, it is also important to not have such configuration drifts between standard and trial clusters as they can lead to such scenarios. This is something we need to take up on the Kyma side.

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Failed to loa...
entry.content:
Please check if you configured remote service correctly from the CAP  side:  https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#connect-and-deploy,

Check your package.json configuration and your model: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#expose-remote-services

Check your CF configuration: There is a nice tutorial regarding remote service here https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-app-ext-service-add-consumption.html#0a5ed8cc-d0fa-4a52-bb56-9c864cd66e71

entry.title: Alternate Resource not appearing in PP/DS PDS in APO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having issue in transferring the alternate resource from HANA to APO via CIF.

For 1 plant I am able to transfer the alternate resource and can see in PDS but for other I can not.

Please suggest what can be missing here. I checked the data parameter and it looks to be almost identical in both the plants.

Please help.

Regards,

Prabhat

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David, 

My name is Ashley Noah; I am currently a new MBA Graduate and a clinical healthcare professional who is actively seeking to piviot my career into IT. After much research and personal reference from a colleague of mine, I was introduced to the SAP Community and was highly interested on how I could take the necessary steps to become a SAP Certified Consultant. My referall source into SAP recently attended the SAP Sapphire conference in Orlando and was introduced to the Digital Skills Initiative for career changers such as me and thought I'd be a great canidate. I'm writing you today to gain more information about how to participate in this arena as I am highly interested and willing to commit to this program. 

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Ashley Noah

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content:
What I mean is I add the file as an attachment with the attachment type "BIN", but then convert it to XLSX in the header. Below is the code.

    re_document->add_attachment( i_attachment_type    = 'BIN'
                                 i_attachment_subject = 'Subject'
                                 i_attachment_size    = im_xstring_size
                                 i_att_content_hex    = lt_list_solix_tab
                                 i_attachment_header  = '&SO_FILENAME=file.XLSX' ).

What happens is, when the email is sent, I receive it as a ".BIN" file instead of a ".XLSX" file.

Follows a screenshot:

entry.title: Re: Can't access fiori app after deployment
entry.content:
Please check if the documentation helps: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/security/authorization

Also the tutorial can be helpful: https://developers.sap.com/group.btp-app-cap-deploy.html

entry.title: Re: Can't access fiori app after deployment

entry.content:
The Sybase license file ("SAP ABAP AS Part License") is at the same place as the other files of the ABAP 7.52 trial download: Developer Trials and Downloads | SAP Developer.

See here how I installed the license file: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/abap-trial-installation-problem-sapsystemname-error/m-p/12530962/highlight/true#M2005451

entry.title: how to display list UIBB data ?
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I am trying to display list UIBB data.

In custom list feeder class(created through CL_MDGF_GUIBB_PCTR_ASSIGNMTS , component : MDGF  Object name : PCCCASS ) through METHOD IF_FPM_GUIBB_LIST~GET_DATA , I can see the  data in CT_DATA (changing parameter) with bol entity reference.

 

Here I can filter the data in CT_DATA and pass  the structure( I created adding few columns of CT_DATA)   as                  MOVE-CORRESPONDING ct_data_new to ct_data.

 

 

I can see the profit center page and the list uibb but with no data.

Could you check this please and let me know if there is anything else that needs to be performed?

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: Re: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with...
entry.content: Hi, thank you so much for your solution, the script works fine if the two ojbects are in the same "form". But as I told you, I'd like to filter the Table_1 (same model of Chart_1 object) inside a popup (that is hidden at begin) in the form but it seems not working. The popup is called Popup_1 and after the script I do a Popup_1.open(). In this case the popup will open but the table will be empty. Do you have any idea why? Thank you

entry.title: Re: RFQ in Fiori
entry.content: Hi, is GRFN_SET_BRF_EXECUTION_MODE available for you in SE38?

We are not able to see SAP HANA Cloud Data source under Select Data source in Analysis Add-ins. We are working on S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition and wanted to connect to cloud system to access Group Reporting queries.

We have followed the steps mentioned in SAP notes but still not able to create a connection for S4 HANA Cloud for group reporting. We have already referred below blog:

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for group reporting with ... - SAP Community

My Analysis version is 2.8.301.94265.

Business roles and catalogues are already assigned to my ID.

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header

As you can see it's a ".BIN" file instead of the desired ".XLSX" file

entry.content: Please check if the documentation will help you: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#views-with-parameters

entry.title: ID FA163EB9A5B11ED6898344A13B52AF41 is initial, unknown, or it does not have the correct object type
entry.content:
In Fiori App F2049 "Manage RFQs" we get the following error.

"ID FA163EB9A5B11ED6898344A13B52AF41 is initial, unknown, or it does not have the correct object type"

Report GRFN_SET_BRF_EXECUTION_MODE from note 2887725 is not available for us.

Can someone help?

Thanks and best regards,

Henning

entry.title: Nota de Entrada x Lotes de produtos - Incoming Invoice x Product Batches/Lots
entry.content:
Alguém já desenvolveu uma consulta que traga as notas fiscais de entrada onde apareça o item e o seu lote? Por exemplo, quero digitar o lote de um produto na cláusula WHERE e ele retornar as notas fiscais referentes.

Sei que o relatório de transação por lotes só aparece pelo documento de recebimento, e estou com dificuldades para criar o relatório.

English: 

Has anyone already developed a query that retrieves incoming invoices showing the item and its batch/lot number? For example, I want to enter a product's batch/lot number in the WHERE clause and have it return the relevant invoices.

I know that the batch/lot transaction report only appears by the receipt document, and I'm having trouble creating the report.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Update to Docker Desktop 4.33.0 

My colleague Stephan (Thank you Stephan!) found a possible problem with Docker (Windows).
After updating Docker Desktop 4.32.x to 4.33.0,
existing containers could no longer be started.
Error messages like „startwait; cannot start disp+work“...
New containers created after the update do not appear to be affected.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: BADI to determine Sales Order header data using sales...
entry.content: Hi @mittal-aman00 , looks like you got some help. If your question has been answered, please accept. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Enter a Reference for NF in PO tab or Material tab error
entry.content:
Hello @larissacandelorio.

For the mentioned error J1B_ERP 037 (Enter a Reference for NF in PO tab or Material tab), this is explained in the KBA 2542974 - Nota Fiscal is not allowed with G/L Account tab and/or more than one reference tab in transaction code MIRO.

As explained in the KBA, when you are creating an Invoice document in transaction code MIRO, using Nota Fiscal Category, which is used for Brazil Localization, you must discriminate a service or a material.

You can try to customize this error message in transaction code OBA5 (view V_T100C in transaction code SM30), however, as explained in the KBA above, it is under customer responsibility if any error comes from this usage.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Solr upgrade issue with version 8.1 to 9.2 in Commerce Cloud 2211.24
entry.content: Off-topic: If you are going to use Hybris 2211.24, upgrade to Solr 9.5 directly, instead of using Solr 9.2. SAP is going to remove the option to use Solr 9.2 around September 2024.

entry.title: Re: UI adapt using SAP BAS
entry.content: Assigning the Business Role ID -BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC to the user worked.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: @ralf_henningStrange because Docker Desktop is using WSL as far as I know. So the Linux Docker installation should be affected, too. Mine is still running on plain WSL (in heavy use in the last weeks by the way 😀)

entry.title: Re: Apply filters to chart inside the popup window from another chart using scripts in SAC Analytica
entry.content:
Hi Sanjay2001 

Thank you so much for your post, it's exactly what I'm trying to implement.

I've already done as you have indicated here above, but in View mode when I click on the first chart, after the popup is open, the table inside the popup will be reset , that is I see something is filtering but it doesn't filter the item I chosed in the first chart

What does it happen?

Thank you

Adriano

entry.title: Re: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with...
entry.content:
Applying filter on the table should be done from pop-up script. You can create a global variable as list1

Script for chart-

var list=Chart_1.getSelections();
for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++)
{
list1[i]=list[i]["Product_3e315003an"];    
}
StoryPopup_1.open();
Script for pop.open-
for(var i=0;i<list1.length;i++){
Table_2.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Product_3e315003an",list1[i]);

}

entry.title: Re: 'Bad Certificate' error when integrating SAP DMC to O...
entry.content:
Hi Rohith,

It seems the OPC UA client certificate is not in the trust store , Open Control center and check the "trusted certificates" tab , if OPC UA system certificate is present and no error there . 

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content: Great read! Half the battle is always being able to show the foundations needed to deliver a good BPM framework. Too many clients want to go from A-Z and forget about B-Y.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud / Cloud for Customer – 2408 Release Briefing Webcast
entry.content:
Hi,

nice webcast as always. Where can we find more information about "Ability to open another C4C screen by clicking on the corresponding button on a Mashup" (slide 20) I could not find any information on SAP Help.

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Higher Education & Research in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear SAP Highered & Research Cloud ERP enthusiast, 

As the summer sun shines brightly, we proudly welcome the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition release, 2408, for Higher Education & Research. This new release is again packed with new features, and groundbreaking UX and AI innovations. This release promises to elevate the user experience and harness the power of artificial intelligence, offering enhanced capabilities and efficiencies.

In addition to these innovations, the 2408 release introduces enhanced features in Grants and Budget (Funds) Management, crucial for higher education and research institutions. These enhancements include more sophisticated tracking and reporting capabilities for grants, allowing institutions to manage funds more effectively and ensure compliance with funding requirements. The enhanced budget management features offer comprehensive tools for planning, monitoring, and adjusting budgets, providing greater financial control and transparency.

As higher education and research institutions, globally, increasingly migrate to cloud solutions, they have a specific focus on embracing best practices and standardizing processes to boost resilience and cost-effectiveness in managing finance, procurement, and funded research project operations. The 2408 release is tailored to meet these evolving needs, ensuring that universities, colleges, K-12 schools, and research institutes can streamline their back-office processes and achieve greater operational efficiency.

One notable trend driving this shift is the focus on "Financial Keys to the Future" as highlighted in EDUCAUSE's Top 10 IT Issues, Technologies, and Trends for 2024. This trend emphasizes the critical need for modernized, flexible, ERP that drives process automation — goals that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 directly addresses with its cutting-edge cloud capabilities and best-practices processes.

We hereby invite you to dive deeper into the exciting new features and enhancements of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. And explore how these innovations are set to support your higher education and research institutions, making them work smarter and more agile.

Enjoy reading and drop me a message if you have any questions!

Cloud ERP core enhancements

Before diving into the innovations for Grants & Budget Management please find below a range of new core Cloud ERP feature-based innovations for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and the 2408 release. Out of the range of line of business enhancements, I have selected 3 topics which I believe are very relevant for institutions of highered and research: UX, Finance, and Environment, Health and Safety.

If you are interested in other areas of innovations for SAP’s Cloud ERP, please check out the Release Video from Bert Schulze:

User Experience

Through AI, we speed up your work and transform the user experience, starting with our generative AI copilot, Joule. After a successful phased roll-out in the Early Adopter Care program, Joule will soon be available for your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, expected in Q3/2024. Joule allows you to express business needs in natural language, providing easy access to applications and data, reducing manual tasks, and boosting productivity.


Screenshot: Our natural-language, generative AI copilot Joule provides easy access to applications and data.

Finance

In finance, we now offer a new cost center review booklet. This app presents actual and planned costs clearly, organizing various predefined reports under the 'Actuals' and 'Plan/Actuals' sections. It integrates essential insights into the business context, effectively answering key business queries. Combining application logic, guidance, and multidimensional insights, it fulfills the "insight to action" promise within embedded analytics. Users can review actual and planned data in a single report and switch between guided views and flexible slicing, dicing, and pivoting according to specific business needs.   


Screenshot:  Display, analyze, and validate cost center data with the new review booklet.

Also, you can now analyze and summarize data from the cost-center review booklet into actionable financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

Please note this use case is available in beta testing! Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698


Screenshot:  Gain financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

Environment, Health, and Safety

A new app for Environment, Health & Safety, for managing investigations significantly enhances tracking and oversight, making processes more efficient in managing your (investigation) projects. The 'Manage Investigations' app offers a detailed platform to document and manage phases, personnel, and timelines of investigations. Administrators can easily guide investigations and assign tasks. This tool combines simplicity with robust features, ensuring procedural integrity. It ultimately improves user experience, accountability, and overall efficiency in investigation management.


Screenshot: The new ‘Manage Investigations’ app fosters great efficiency in managing the investigation process. 

Grants & Budget Management

The S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition offers a comprehensive set of features and functions of Grants and Budget Management for public sector entities that include state and local governments, cities, K-12 schools, and Higher Education & Research.

With the 2408 release, there have been a range of new enhancements delivered and made available for our (Higher) Education & Research customers. Below an overview on the new 2408 enhancements.

New country versions for: Australia, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom

The 2408 release introduces the Public Sector Management (PSM) scope bundle, now as well accessible, beside the US, Germany, and Canada, also for Australia, The Netherlands, and the UK. This specific industry scope bundle, which is built, with and for Higher Education & Research, comprises specific processes designed for higher education and research. These higher education and research-specific processes include the unique functionality required for the financial management of sponsored research, grants, and funds. Also, they are complemented by for example core processes for finance, procurement, logistics, asset accounting, treasury, leasing, sales, plant maintenance, contract account and project management.

You can use the SAP Process Navigator for further details, and to get a complete overview of which scope items are made available in this new global PSM scope bundle.

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP for Me, and the Higher Education & Research specific scope items.

Navigational assistance with the Joule co-pilot

Features:

Express your business requirement in natural language and have the Joule copilot enable navigation to applications in budget management, grantee management, and fund accounting, where you can execute your business processes

Benefits:

  • Improve user satisfaction through the ability to express business requirements in natural language
  • Quickly and efficiently navigate to the ideal, relevant applications, with the help of Joule


Screenshot: SAP Joule, using to navigate through the system.

Substitution Tool for Budget Maintenance

Features:

You now have the ability to automatically derive values (for example, for account assignments, budget type, and item description) when creating a budget document using the app for maintaining budget document

Benefits:

  • Better usability and faster end-user input
  • Improve data quality by prepopulating the right data

Screenshot: SAP app for Manage Substitution and Validation Rules

Ability to consume the budget for an expected expense instead of the posting date

Features:

  • Configure the behavior of the budget consumption date
  • Leverage this feature to use a due date (or expected expense date) as a budget consumption date; for instance, update purchase orders with a delivery date of next year to consume next year’s budget

Benefits:

  • Post commitments into future years even when the document is created today
  • Avoid consuming this year’s budget and prevent unnecessary carry forwards
  • Improve compliance in some countries where this is a legal requirement

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP configuration for define update date for budget consumption.

Checking budget availability using project hierarchies

Features:

  • Summarize a project budget using universal hierarchies
  • Use project hierarchies with work breakdown structure elements and universal hierarchies

Benefits:

  • You can now roll up budgets for certain projects within the project hierarchy and other projects using universal hierarchies
  • Capabilities to model a program structure above project hierarchies
  • Use project hierarchies without maintaining additional universal hierarchies


Screenshot: SAP configuration for defining availability control profile and Journal Field Dependencies.

Budget updates for generating budget documents

Features:

Allowing the generation of budget documents when the budget is uploaded, including documents from budget planning tools or Microsoft Excel

Benefits:

Give users a consistent base of budget maintenance documents for uploaded and manually created budget documents

 
Screenshot: SAP app to manage jobs, in this case automatic budget header creation.

Reporting on the budget versus payments and open invoices 

Features:

  • Ability to compare budgets against payments and open invoices
  • Align budgetary reporting with financial and management reporting

Benefits:

Obtain real-time information about budget spending

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP app to query and report on budget and payment line items.

Higher Education & Research Learning Journeys

In late 2023, three new learning journeys were released on Learnings.sap.com. These journeys provide access to close to 500 pages of educational content, with ongoing digital content updates. Seize the chance to enhance your comprehension of the solution through these comprehensive courses covering Budget Management, Grants Management, and Fund Accounting (US specific)!


Screenshot: SAP Learning Hub - Learning Journeys 

More info on the Grant and Budget management functionalities can be found via the Product Documentation and Help webpage: SAP.Help.com 

Screenshot: SAP Help.com 

For more information on what is coming into the next release for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition,  please scroll through the SAP Roadmap Explorer.

 
Screenshot: SAP Roadmap Explorer 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Did you miss the live sessions? We've got you covered!

Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand –anywhere, anytime.

Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

 ================================================================================

Closing Words

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts.

Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Thank you!

Rob Jonkers - SAP Higher Education & Research

entry.title: Is there a way to access SAP Build Backend in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:

does anyone know if there is any way to access the SAP Build backend like visual cloud functions in SAP Build Process Automation? I have an approval workflow and need to save the result in our backend. But I can't find a way to do it.

Best regards,

Bastian

entry.title: Re: SAPGUI Installation Server Part 6 - LSH and Distribution

Because I saw "install package on remote workstation" but i can insert only one server

entry.title: Re: Can a dismantling product order generate only raw mat...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try testing your scenario using CO07, production order without material. In the component section you can add only the receiving component in negative (-) quantities (movement type will be 531). you can add a routing to capture any operations, work centers and related activity usages for dismantling process.

You can select appropriate cost center in the order settlement rule to transfer all the actual cost. This cost will not include finished material cost, which has already issued to the cost center(scrapped).

Regards,

Arjuna

The Inputcontrol1 has a primary facility name and inputcontrol2 has sub facility names (multiple facilities) but they want to by default select the facility name chosen in the first one (primary), we can manually select it but we are looking for a way to default to the first selection. I understand the cascading filters but that will not work. Thank you!

entry.title: From Query Builder to BI platform CMS system database universe
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need a list of our active reports, recipients, and frequency.  I normally use Query Builder, but I need to send the results out and the output format won't do.  I started to copy and paste from the  output to Excel, but there are nearly 800 reports.

We recently upgraded to BO v4.2SP9 on another server not yet in Production (on our way to 4.3), and I would like to learn how use the new BI Platform CMS System db using webi to create this list.  I've been reading online but haven't been able to figure out how to do it. Our consultant created a BI Repository Analysis folder and there are Web Intelligence Samples. He also created a webi report to compare our old server's reports to our new, so I've been playing around with that, but it is seems complicated with L, L1, etc. and I am not doing it correctly.

Where can I learn how to use webi with this new feature of BO to create my list? I am hoping for a tutorial or written instructions on how the database works and how to use it.

This is what I use in Query Builder:

Select SI_NAME, SI_NEXTRUNTIME, SI_SCHEDULE_TYPE, SI_DESTINATIONS,
SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES, SI_CALENDAR_TEMPLATE_ID, SI_OBJID,
SI_TYPE, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_CALENDAR_TEMPLATE_ID, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_DESTINATIONS
from ci_infoobjects where si_recurring = 1 and SI_schedule_status = 9

Here is something I created in the new CMS from reading but I didn't get far.

Thank you for any help and pointing me in the right direction!

K L Venkatesh

entry.title: Re: In SAP C4C, While creating an Opportunity in QC Scree...

Hello, Subrahmanyam
One suggestion is to use screen validation rules to display a warning message. You can do this in adaptation mode. More information can be found in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/rules-and-validations-in-sap-c4c/ba-p/13522311

CM

entry.title: Re: [CPI-Groovy]: Compare Integer and remove XML node
entry.content:
You can try with XmlParser. 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.util.XmlParser;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import java.util.Date;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Calendar;
import groovy.time.TimeCategory;
import java.util.GregorianCalendar;

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def body = message.getBody(java.io.Reader);
    def payload = new XmlParser().parse(body);

    map = message.getProperties();
    def lsrd = map.get("interfaceLastRunTime");
    int effDateDiff = map.get("effDateDiff").toInteger();
    def manual_run = map.get("ManualRun");
    golive_date = map.get("golive_date");
    Manual_Delta_LSRD = map.get("Manual_Delta_LSRD");
    end_dt = map.get("end_dt");
    
	if(lsrd == null || lsrd == "")
    {
       if(Manual_Delta_LSRD == null || Manual_Delta_LSRD == "")
    	{
        	lsrd = golive_date;
    	}
		lsrd = Manual_Delta_LSRD;
    }
    lsrd = lsrd.substring(0, 19);
    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("ddMMyyyy");
    SimpleDateFormat sdtf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"); 

    def output = ""
 payload.Row.findAll {
     def pid = it.PID.text();
       def jobinfo_stdt = it.jobinfo_stdt.text()
       int dateDiffInDays
       if(jobinfo_stdt != null && jobinfo_stdt != "")
       {
           Date new_jobinfo_stdt = sdf.parse(jobinfo_stdt);
           Date new_LSRD = sdtf.parse(lsrd); 
           
             dateDiffInDays = new_LSRD - new_jobinfo_stdt;
            dateDiffInDays=dateDiffInDays.toInteger()+1
         
                  
       } 
        dateDiffInDays >= effDateDiff 
   
       // it.PID.text() == "M123456"
      
            } .each { payload.remove(it) }
     
     message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(payload));
   //message.setBody("sss");
    return message;
}

 

 

https://groovyide.com/cpi/share/v1/7Vdtb9s2EP4rqj60MhZLtpM4W-K4SOMlDlBngeMCGyDAYCzKYSeRAkk59Vz_9x0lSqJkZWiBfSlQwYDE5-458t5IemcTmqTSPt_ZTyzY2uf26P2XOLI2mAvC6KVv992eb1uYrlhA6BqAT4ub7q--_X7sc5-O5njFeCCygS9Hc_aiP2Fwdb24--N-fD29ur_9feTpYSl-uJuMZ_3B8cnpcOSpQSn5iIRc3qMYey3YMuF4Q1gqDOEN4YeMCmyjCBSlEklw0gBvMQ0wN4DP7InQkC2FDOS4N-ydDHqDk5FXg1uV26bEG0zl-HTk5R91vJUQJ9EjLDIV4wWwqlHlYxpFD4jLBYnxHQ3Gkqd45DXRKuSYx4iq2RZgjXHEt-M5BL8FLjkcr1LOIfclZII6Mme90zwyDUErZQOhx2OVeVM_R18ntASopgQFCkbhMY1mYOmKd-jLt7lXJv7b3TsZgIP_u38DeL7Dv5FXNeT39-bw9OR40P9BevMsS9Hxz9782Zs_Wm_Clz5F7SP7GSMoc6FOZBYF02wEx_IURxF7Y--P7ISzBHNJcKZDqMQ8RCusenCeUlVWoK4i0u0Nu73-otc7z35gG4fhBEk8IWEIOkMFzRBNUQREAP4Ck0f2mkVkg5cBKAJWqiwnOJJo-fFxPrFen4AGy0CW4rPusSHew-LFipMku26o6IAiUTUtrRWLXYESdw2zvqCtSxIXIoLdVSokiwO8cVNJIneGhUBrfOFTzfuMNigXTZF4nqGkEq05Y5ttLvwzVj0nMD8Qw2XHnSH-d5p8SEkUvKIB_E9gp21eFdAGLvEX6T4CEmElvWHQwbKNe40iiBg6nFNCFl2VymvgrxnftrFvuRIRRA0zPuyRoaXDZEGprOATFoGcAovzd8faKW0LHsVQlz_rshC6ayw_AOJkkxHmzrMy7FxUhARtI4YC4FD8YpXxdTpuoj4cZbBzUUwRo6Ru_aEsYse0GgmuTMaqErB0_Nby9u2CAlLLqOka08CB4Ep2B6bWaoXGfHFe2jylNW7ZFNVURlfUVA28Uj7smEPrhrQi5v1T9yODKhW1dZDQySMF0YfjxPr61SrGvg2queYuf6k4hU7Lkipyq9Cw5MvKFgx0lgzXi7XJfb7baY0Du1pvn7-0lnq5In0SUu2OTu_I6v9WeNvsIksEoa65pghiFQSz2RaeKlotfPkfBhS5O5t1g-Dd4t10eh7H50Ioa5bZLCyV8J_JykMEsO4FF_ZzNyQ0uIKoFgHLeoUoN4l04SKVbQ5lDWoF83KSa5qIplTZhKoPdGnf0QnaCjPRNVtvdI7fvrWauJHeWq2oR8VEhWjZWBgEX7e3KTCcqZF14auIa5bKdBZLQ702sBqO5ZnKLXUPVlSft0G9rA_NDeCXvkFszF_H9oa4sbLxZW3ryfRKZc-rpzvvJ_1nN6uZlrn3lovR6tnalQXFccw22CGyU7RMQSm2UqE3an1AwRgOhIj8gx1to6Oz43lNim-LvLZzkxzLlNPCMIB7OM_DlK7UNRwOauMsgZP8Xw

 

https://www.baeldung.com/groovy-xml

entry.title: Linking Dimensions across different models to pick the current master data status
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning, we have a requirement to fetch the store status based on the date filtered in the story.

In the below example, Store A is under renovation for Period 1 of 2024 to Period 3 of 2024
Store B is closed in Period 4
Store C was Already Open
Store D is a new store opened in Period 2 of 2024.

User will maintain the data in a custom table

 


Hence, the requirement is that lets assume we are in period 9 of the 2024.

If a person runs the period filter in the dashboard from Period 1 to Period 4, the below store status should be visible in the table, based on the data mentioned in the table

StoreStatus
ARenovation
BClosed
COpen
DNew

In the transaction data being sent to SAC, we have the store code & the posting date being sent.

We do not want to load this store status on the transactional data, since business might change the store status for backdated dates.

E.g., in July 2024, they might change the status of a store of Jan 2024.

Hence, based on the data in the table, we want the system to use a similar formula like VLOOKUP, where system would pick the status mentioned in the above table based on the store code & the period combination.

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: Spring 6 Support
entry.content: As far as I know, it's planned for the next major release next year. More likely second half of the next year. Even more likely last quarter of the next year.

It has been marked as Public Access (did not yet work in DataAccessControls).
But in SAC I can't see that model, but another, Analitical Model created in DataBuilder is visible.

entry.title: Crystal Reports - How to configure Report Footer to print on same page rather than a separate page
entry.content: Hello - I am new to this community so hopefully I am making sense to everyone.  I am also very new to Crystal Reports so any and all advice would be greatly appreciated.  Working with CR version 14.0.3.  The form code I am working on needs to print a Terms & Conditions disclaimer at the bottom.  I have inserted a text object into the Report Footer section (previously was suppressed) and the text does print now as it should.  However, it is printing on a separate page rather than the same page.  This form is a Sales Order Pick Sheet used within in our Sage ERP system and in more cases than not, there is plenty of room on the initial page to have the Terms & Conditions print at the bottom of that first page.  In the Section Expert 'New Page Before' is not checked and 'Keep Together' is checked.  Can someone explain how to configure it such that this disclaimer will print at the bottom of the first page IF there is room for it?  Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition API Response Data
entry.content:
Dear Community,

My question is about the data returned by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition APIs, for example, API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.

Let’s say I want to consult the root node of Sales Order with ID 7. This is the SO in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

This is the API call:

https://my000000-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('7')

This is the service response of the nodes marked in red on the image:

 

<content type="application/xml">
        <m:properties>
            <d:SalesOrder>7</d:SalesOrder>
            ...
            <d:TransactionCurrency>MXN</d:TransactionCurrency>
            <d:IncotermsClassification>DAP</d:IncotermsClassification>
            <d:CustomerPaymentTerms>0002</d:CustomerPaymentTerms>
           ...
        </m:properties>
</content>

 

As you can see, the API does not return associated texts with each of the codes:

  • MXN: Mexican Pesos
  • DAP: Delivered at Place
  • 0002: 14 Days 2%, 30 Net

My questions are: Is there any way to include the texts in the API response? If yes, is there any way to indicate in the API request the language in which you want to receive them?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to hidden parameter element with ABAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi @Phuhs,

It is possible to hide parameters with conditions. For instance, if we take an action with two parameters, we can hide one of them for Type='API1'.

Add boolean field "Param1IsHidden" to abstract entity. This field will be used to hide a parameter "Param1" using the annotation "@UI.hidden: #(Param1IsHidden)".

@EndUserText.label: 'Abstract Entity for Parameters'
define abstract entity ZMHL_A_Parameter
{ 
  @UI.hidden: #(Param1IsHidden)
  Param1         : abap.char(10);
  @UI.hidden: true
  Param1IsHidden : abap_boolean;
  Param2         : abap.char(10);

}

Then go to behavior definition and define function "GetDefaultsForAction" for the action to get value for boolean field "Param1IsHidden". The name of this function should star with "GetDefaultsFor...." and it will be called before the popup is shown to get default values for parameters.

 action Action parameter ZMHL_A_Parameter result [1] $self
  { default function GetDefaultsForAction; }

Implement the corresponding method "getdefaultsforaction" in the class. There you can select all necessary data by keys and then give true or false value to field "Param1IsHidden" to hide or show corresponding parameter "Param1" in popup.

  METHOD getdefaultsforaction.
    READ ENTITY IN LOCAL MODE zmhl_i_header
      FIELDS ( type ) WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(lt_result).

    result = CORRESPONDING #( keys ).
    LOOP AT result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_result>).
      <fs_result>-%param-param1ishidden = COND #( WHEN lt_result[ %tky = <fs_result>-%tky ]-type = 'API1'
                                                  THEN abap_true
                                                  ELSE abap_false ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

Don't forget to add the function "GetDefaultsForAction"  to projection behavior definition.

  use action action;
  use function GetDefaultsForAction;

 

Best Regards,

Maryia

entry.title: Re: SAC Script needed to retrive the selected values of a...
entry.content: Me and SAC Script are not friends ... .

entry.title: Best way to default values in filter bar
entry.content:
We have a simple requirement to default certain filter-bar fields in SAP's standard Fiori Element tiles. These should be the default for all users.

For example in the Sales Order Overview F2200, the currency should default to CAD not EUR, and sales org default to XXX, etc.

What is the best way of doing this? There are many options that seem to be overwriting each other, we just need to know what the best approach is. Things we have tried so far:

1. Create a public default Variant in Adapt UI, put it in a transport and move it to prod. This works, except the currency still shows up as EUR.

2. Configure User Defaults in settings. However, because you can't transport user defaults, this is not a good solution, we can't ask 3000 users to set their defaults before using Fiori.

3. The Sales tiles have parameters like &&User.Default&&currency. We can create new Z tiles and set those default parameters to certain values. This however did not work, as the currency still goes back to EUR no matter what the value passed in the parameter.

So the question again is what is the best way to set default values to filter bars for ALL users?

____

(ps. we've already looked at many blogs, such as this, this, this but as mentioned some values still don't get defaulted for all users, like currency).

entry.title: Account Assignment Group to Internal Order Type
entry.content:
Hello SAP Guru,

Seeking for your kind assistance regarding my question.

Is it possible to only allow specific Internal Order Type (Capital IO) to be used by only one Account Assignment Group in a standard functionality? Or will it be subject for enhancement?

Hoping someone will help me.

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Can we use KPI Item as a horizontal progress bar?
entry.content: We do not currently have a horizontal KPI progress indicator.  One option might be to use a text KPI to indicate x/y where x is the current number completed out of a total y.

entry.title: Re: From Query Builder to BI platform CMS system database...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no tutorial available. Only the sample universe and reports that you can explore and adapt to your needs.

If you are familiar with BI RESTful SDK, you can use the CMS query and enter your select statement as you would in the query builder, get the result as XML or JSON, and then copy/import it into your Excel spreadsheet or other program.

For information about using CMS queries with BI RESTful SDK, see the SAP help page.

here an example:
POST http://<server>:<port>/biprws//v1/cmsquery

body:

<attrs xmlns="http://www.sap.com/rws/bip">
    <attr name="query" type="string">Select SI_NAME, SI_NEXTRUNTIME, SI_SCHEDULE_TYPE, SI_DESTINATIONS, SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES, SI_CALENDAR_TEMPLATE_ID, SI_OBJID, SI_TYPE, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_CALENDAR_TEMPLATE_ID, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_DESTINATIONS from ci_infoobjects where si_recurring = 1 and SI_schedule_status = 9</attr>
</attrs>

entry.title: Re: Multiple creates in one POST call for a RAP business object
entry.content: Hi ilja, I was wondering if you managed to solve this problem ?? i think tin the old Gateway world this was resolved using the $batch addition ( so I assume a similar call in RAP ) - but did you resolve how to implement this $batch processing in the RAP world with the bahaviours ?? Thanks Dave

entry.title: Re: Multiple creates in one POST call for a RAP business object
entry.content: possibly the resolution: ABAP Restful Application Programming Model (RAP) -... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAVE Attachments in ABAP Restful programming managed Fiori App
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen...
entry.content:
Everything is working fine in your system. We were able to connect and saw that Personas operates as expected. Check your incident.

You should remove all service parameters you added to service personas3. Those are only needed for service personas. Also, you can remove the theme parameter for sap_bluecrystal, since that will not work / superfluous in your S/4HANA 2021 system.
